body.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| extend SeverityLower = tolower(Severity)
| summarize OpenCount=countif(Status != 'Closed'), NewThisWeek=countif(CreatedTime >= ago(7d)), High=countif(SeverityLower == 'high'), Medium=countif(SeverityLower == 'medium'), Low=countif(SeverityLower == 'low'), Top=make_list(pack('id', tostring(IncidentNumber), 'title', Title, 'severity', Severity, 'owner', tostring(Owner), 'createdUtc', tostring(CreatedTime)), 10)

sentinelCost.note: Estimated from Log Analytics Usage table - not invoiced cost.

defenderCost.note: Actual billed cost from Azure Cost Management for MDC + MDE meters this billing cycle.

Build_KPI_Strip.inputs:
@{concat( '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '
Open incidents
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents']), '
', if(greater(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0)))), concat('▲ +', string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0)))))), if(less(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0)))), concat('▼ ', string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0)))))), '– flat')), '
High sev
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['highSevIncidents']), '
prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['highSevIncidents'],0)), '
New (7d)
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['newIncidents']), '
prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['newIncidents'],0)), '
Crit/High vulns
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['vulnsCount']), if(equals(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['vulnsCount'])), 50), '+', ''), '
prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['vulnsCount'],0)), '
Risky users
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['riskyUsers']), '
prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['riskyUsers'],0)), '
Sentinel cost
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['sentinelCostEur']), '€
cycle / cap ', string(parameters('costCapMonthlyEur')), '€
Entra IDP risk
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['entraRiskDetections']), '
', if(greater(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['entraRiskDetections'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['entraRiskDetections'],0)))), concat('▲ +', string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['entraRiskDetections'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['entraRiskDetections'],0)))))), if(less(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['entraRiskDetections'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['entraRiskDetections'],0)))), concat('▼ ', string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['entraRiskDetections'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['entraRiskDetections'],0)))))), '– flat')), '
Intune non-compl
', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['intuneNonCompliant']), '
', if(greater(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['intuneNonCompliant'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['intuneNonCompliant'],0)))), concat('▲ +', string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['intuneNonCompliant'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['intuneNonCompliant'],0)))))), if(less(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['intuneNonCompliant'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['intuneNonCompliant'],0)))), concat('▼ ', string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['intuneNonCompliant'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['intuneNonCompliant'],0)))))), '– flat')), '
' )}

inputs.select: @concat('', coalesce(item()?['name'], item()?['id'], '(unknown)'), '', coalesce(item()?['severity'], '?'), '', string(coalesce(item()?['cvssV3'], item()?['cvss'], '-')), '', string(coalesce(item()?['exposedMachines'], '-')), '')

@concat('', coalesce(item()?['displayName'], item()?['id'], '(unknown)'), '', string(coalesce(item()?['severity'],'?')), '', string(coalesce(item()?['status'],'-')), '', substring(string(coalesce(item()?['createdDateTime'],'')),0, if(greater(length(string(coalesce(item()?['createdDateTime'],''))),10),10,length(string(coalesce(item()?['createdDateTime'],''))))), '')

@concat('', string(coalesce(item()?['userPrincipalName'], item()?['userDisplayName'], '(unknown)')), '', string(coalesce(item()?['riskLevel'],'?')), '', string(coalesce(item()?['riskState'],'-')), '', substring(string(coalesce(item()?['riskLastUpdatedDateTime'],'')),0, if(greater(length(string(coalesce(item()?['riskLastUpdatedDateTime'],''))),10),10,length(string(coalesce(item()?['riskLastUpdatedDateTime'],''))))), '')

inputs.incidents: @if(empty(body('Select_Top5_Incidents')), 'No new XDR incidents this week.', join(body('Select_Top5_Incidents'), ''))
inputs.risky: @if(empty(body('Select_Top5_RiskyUsers')), 'No high-risk identities flagged this week.', join(body('Select_Top5_RiskyUsers'), ''))

Build_WhatsChanged.inputs:
@{if(equals(length(outputs('Init_HistoryEntries')),0), '
  • First report for this customer — week-over-week comparison will appear next week.
    • ', concat( '
  • Open incidents: ', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents']), ' (prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0)), ', delta ', if(greaterOrEquals(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0)))),0),'+',''), string(sub(int(string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['openIncidents'])), int(string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['openIncidents'],0))))), ')
    • ', '
  • High-severity incidents: ', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['highSevIncidents']), ' (prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['highSevIncidents'],0)), ')
    • ', '
  • New incidents (7d): ', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['newIncidents']), ' (prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['newIncidents'],0)), ')
    • ', '
  • Crit/High vulnerabilities: ', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['vulnsCount']), ' (prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['vulnsCount'],0)), ')
    • ', '
  • Risky users: ', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['riskyUsers']), ' (prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['riskyUsers'],0)), ')
    • ', '
  • Sentinel cycle cost: ', string(outputs('Compute_KPIs')?['sentinelCostEur']), '€ (prior ', string(coalesce(outputs('Build_PriorKpis')?['sentinelCostEur'],0)), '€)
    • ' ) )}

body.PromptContent: @{concat('Run the WeeklySecurityReportEntrypoint skill against the supplied dataset and customer context. Return only the JSON object produced by the skill, with no additional commentary.')}

Render_Email_Html.inputs:
@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(
  outputs('Pick_Template'),
  '{{CUSTOMER_DISPLAY_NAME}}', coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['displayName'], parameters('customerId'))),
  '{{CUSTOMER_LOGO_URL}}', coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['logoUrl'], '')),
  '{{PRIMARY_COLOR}}', coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['primaryColor'], '#0b3d91')),
  '{{ACCENT_COLOR}}',  coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['accentColor'],  '#16a34a')),
  '{{REPORT_PERIOD_START}}', formatDateTime(addDays(utcNow(),-7),'yyyy-MM-dd')),
  '{{REPORT_PERIOD_END}}',   formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy-MM-dd')),
  '{{RISK_RATING}}', coalesce(body('Parse_Copilot_Response')?['riskRating'], 'Moderate')),
  '{{RISK_COLOR}}',  outputs('Compose_RiskColor')),
  '{{EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY}}', coalesce(body('Parse_Copilot_Response')?['executiveSummary'], 'No summary available.')),
  '{{TOP_ACTIONS_LIST}}', outputs('Compose_TopActionsList')),
  '{{SECTIONS_BLOCK}}', outputs('Compose_SectionsBlock')),
  '{{KPI_STRIP}}', outputs('Build_KPI_Strip')),
  '{{TOP5_VULNS_TABLE}}', outputs('Build_Top5_Tables')?['vulns']),
  '{{TOP5_INCIDENTS_TABLE}}', outputs('Build_Top5_Tables')?['incidents']),
  '{{TOP5_RISKY_USERS_TABLE}}', outputs('Build_Top5_Tables')?['risky']),
  '{{WHATS_CHANGED}}', outputs('Build_WhatsChanged'))
}

body.To: @if(equals(outputs('Compose_PiiHoldback'), true), if(empty(parameters('opsAlertEmail')), outputs('Init_Recipients'), parameters('opsAlertEmail')), if(equals(outputs('Project_Monthly_Cost')?['capExceeded'], true),  if(empty(parameters('opsAlertEmail')), outputs('Init_Recipients'), parameters('opsAlertEmail')),  outputs('Init_Recipients')))
body.Subject: @{if(equals(outputs('Compose_PiiHoldback'), true), concat('[PII GUARD] held back: ', coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['displayName'], parameters('customerId')), ' - matched ', string(length(body('Scan_For_Pii_Patterns'))), ' pattern(s)'), if(equals(outputs('Project_Monthly_Cost')?['capExceeded'], true),  concat(outputs('Init_Strings')?['costCapPrefix'], ' ', coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['displayName'], parameters('customerId')),  ' - projected ', string(add(outputs('Project_Monthly_Cost')?['sentinelCycleEur'], outputs('Project_Monthly_Cost')?['copilotEstimateEur'])),  ' EUR > cap ', string(parameters('costCapMonthlyEur')), ' EUR'),  concat(coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['subject'], outputs('Init_Strings')?['subject']), ' - ', coalesce(body('Parse_Customer_Config')?['displayName'], parameters('customerId')),  ' - ', formatDateTime(utcNow(),'yyyy-MM-dd'))))}

On_Failure.inputs: Security Pulse run failed. See run history for details.

Init_Strings.inputs: @if(equals(outputs('Init_Language'),'de'), json('{"subject": "Wöchentlicher Sicherheitsbericht", "costCapPrefix": "[KOSTENLIMIT ÜBERSCHRITTEN]", "noData": "Keine Daten", "noCommentary": "Keine Anmerkungen.", "sectionTitles": {"vulnerabilities": "Schwachstellen", "threatLandscape": "Bedrohungslage", "mdtiHighlights": "Threat-Intel-Highlights", "xdrIncidents": "Defender-XDR-Vorfälle", "sentinelIncidents": "Sentinel-Vorfälle", "riskyIdentities": "Risikoidentitäten", "entraIdProtection": "Entra ID Protection", "intuneCompliance": "Intune-Compliance", "purviewDlp": "Purview DLP", "sentinelCost": "Sicherheitskosten (Sentinel + Defender)"}}'), json('{"subject": "Weekly Security Report", "costCapPrefix": "[COST CAP EXCEEDED]", "noData": "No data", "noCommentary": "No commentary.", "sectionTitles": {"vulnerabilities": "Vulnerabilities", "threatLandscape": "Threat landscape", "mdtiHighlights": "Threat intel highlights", "xdrIncidents": "Defender XDR incidents", "sentinelIncidents": "Sentinel incidents", "riskyIdentities": "Risky identities", "entraIdProtection": "Entra ID Protection", "intuneCompliance": "Intune compliance", "purviewDlp": "Purview DLP", "sentinelCost": "Security cost (Sentinel + Defender)"}}'))

body.text: Full HTML report has been emailed to the configured recipients.
